case_title: BETTER PROPERTY MANAGEMENT VS. SCOTT FRYXELL et al

ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF BETTER PROPERTY MANAGEMENT
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BETTER PROPERTY MANAGEMENT AS TO DEFENDANT FRYXELL, SCOTT DOES 1 TO X SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT FRYXELL, SCOTT
NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BETTER PROPERTY MANAGEMENT

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BETTER PROPERTY MANAGEMENT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FRYXELL, SCOTT THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 591 A DOLORES STREET, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO $6,812.96 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,812.96, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOC
